suppress.notes: file name: launcher-interface-1.4.4.jar reason: false positive on the regex pattern of impacted modules → sbt tool is at 1.10.4 whereas this vulnerability has been patched in version 1.9.7.
file name: sbinary_2.13-0.5.1.jar reason: false positive on the regex pattern of impacted modules → sbt tool is at 1.10.4 whereas this vulnerability has been patched in version 1.9.7.
